hooks.command: if [ -f pdd/context/project.md ]; then updated=$(grep -i 'last updated' pdd/context/project.md | head -1); if [ -n "$updated" ]; then echo "PDD context exists. $updated — check if anything has changed."; else echo "PDD context exists but has no Last updated date. Consider adding one."; fi; elif [ -f context/project.md ]; then updated=$(grep -i 'last updated' context/project.md | head -1); if [ -n "$updated" ]; then echo "PDD context exists (legacy layout). $updated — consider migrating to pdd/ layout (see docs/migration.md)."; else echo "PDD context exists (legacy layout) but has no Last updated date. Consider adding one and migrating to pdd/ layout."; fi; elif [ -d pdd/prompts/ ] || [ -d pdd/context/ ]; then echo "PDD project detected but pdd/context/project.md is missing. Run /project:pdd-context to create it."; elif [ -d prompts/ ] || [ -d context/ ]; then echo "PDD project detected (legacy layout) but context/project.md is missing. Run /project:pdd-context to create it, and consider migrating to pdd/ layout (see docs/migration.md)."; fi
